---
name: Bug report
about: Something in a generated deck, template, or skill did not work as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Which part?**
- [ ] A skill (deck-pitch, deck-sales, deck-launch, deck-keynote, deck-all-hands, deck-import, deck-critique-lite, deck-builder core)
- [ ] A template (airbnb, stripe, anthropic, sequoia-classic, or a default preset)
- [ ] A web page (gallery, style presets, quick-start)
- [ ] Plugin install or marketplace

**Skill or template name:**

**Coding agent used:** (Claude Code, Codex, Kimi Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, other)

**What you asked for:**

**What you expected:**

**What actually happened:**

**Input file (only for import):** PDF or PPTX, and the page or slide count

**Generated HTML (if relevant):** attach the file or paste the relevant section

**Environment:**
- OS:
- git version (run `git --version`; marketplace install needs 2.9 or newer):
- Claude Code version (run `claude --version`):
